homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

0:
How correct is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a correct caption to not have any information absent from the audio. Use the worst score if all the information in the caption is absent from the audio, and use the best score if all the information in the caption is present in the audio.

1 - completely incorrect
2 - mostly incorrect
3 - somewhat correct
4 - mostly correct
5 - completely correct
1:
How complete is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a complete caption to have all relevant information concerning genre, mood, and instrumentation of the audio. Use the worst score if the caption does not have any relevant information on these aspects for the audio, and the best score if the caption contains all relevant information on these aspects for the audio.

1 - incomplete
2 - mostly incomplete
3 - somewhat complete
4 - mostly complete
5 - complete

questions.caption: This segment is an intense example of extreme metal that blends elements of death and grindcore. Distorted electric guitars, heavy drums, and synthesizer work together to create a relentless rhythm defined by chaos and violence.

questions.name: Sample 5
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track blends a groovy, upbeat mood with a driving bassline and funky electric guitar. The medium tempo supports the lively atmosphere, while melodic keyboard accents add depth to the rhythmic energy. Elements of soulful percussion and happy vibes further enhance the energetic groove characteristic of funk music.

questions.name: Sample 6
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This piece features a solo piano performance characterized by a slow, deliberate tempo that fosters a melancholic and reflective atmosphere. The steady rhythm emphasizes the instrument's lower tones, creating a sound defined by deep introspection and emotional weight. Although some tags suggest strings or happy moods, the audio focuses almost entirely on the solitary expression of classical piano.

questions.name: Sample 7
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track presents a slow rock ballad featuring a clean, clear guitar solo over a steady drumming rhythm. A simple and repetitive bass guitar line provides a solid foundation for the performance within what sounds like a live concert setting. The arrangement relies heavily on electric guitar textures to create an emotional depth that allows the audience to fully experience the music.

Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This folk song features a lead violin melody supported by guitar and viola, creating a simple yet effective musical arrangement. The piece carries a romantic tone with an undercurrent of melancholy, evoking the atmosphere of a ballad suitable for a quiet movie scene.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
